bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/bellhopcuda/src && bin/bellhopcuda test/in/MunkB_ray && ls -lh MunkB_ray.ray

bash -c 
set -e
cd 'B:/develop/moat/projects/bellhopcuda/src'
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH"

echo '=== GPU Ray Tests ==='
pass=0; fail=0

# Generate CPU references first
PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/blockB_ray > /dev/null 2>&1 && cp test/in/blockB_ray.ray /tmp/ref_blockB_ray.ray
PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/MunkB_ray > /dev/null 2>&1 && cp test/in/MunkB_ray.ray /tmp/ref_MunkB_ray.ray
PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/DickinsBray > /dev/null 2>&1 && cp test/in/DickinsBray.ray /tmp/ref_DickinsBray.ray
PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/ParaBot > /dev/null 2>&1 && cp test/in/ParaBot.ray /tmp/ref_ParaBot.ray

# GPU ray tests
for testname in blockB_ray MunkB_ray DickinsBray ParaBot; do
    bin/bellhopcuda.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_ray_direct.py test/in/${testname}.ray /tmp/ref_${testname}.ray 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -qi 'fail\|error\|differ'; then
        echo "FAIL GPU: $testname"; fail=$((fail+1))
    else
        echo "PASS GPU: $testname"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo '=== GPU TL Tests ==='
# GPU TL tests
for testname in MunkB_Coh arcticB_cpp; do
    bin/bellhopcuda.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_shdfil_direct.py test/in/${testname}.shd test/cxx1/${testname}.shd 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -q 'ERROR'; then
        echo "FAIL GPU TL: $testname"; fail=$((fail+1))
    else
        echo "PASS GPU TL: $testname"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo '=== CPU Regression Tests (bellhopcxx) ==='
# CPU tests
for testname in MunkB_Coh arcticB_cpp; do
    bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_shdfil_direct.py test/in/${testname}.shd test/cxx1/${testname}.shd 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -q 'ERROR'; then
        echo "FAIL CPU: $testname"; fail=$((fail+1))
    else
        echo "PASS CPU: $testname"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo "TOTAL: PASS=$pass FAIL=$fail"
[ $fail -eq 0 ]

bash -c 
set -e
cd 'B:/develop/moat/projects/bellhopcuda/src'
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH"

pass=0; fail=0

echo '=== Generate CPU references ==='
for testname in blockB_ray MunkB_ray DickinsBray ParaBot; do
    bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    cp test/in/${testname}.ray /tmp/ref_${testname}.ray 2>/dev/null || true
done
for testname in MunkB_Coh arcticB_cpp; do
    bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    cp test/in/${testname}.shd /tmp/ref_${testname}.shd
done
echo 'Done'

echo ''
echo '=== GPU Ray Tests ==='
for testname in blockB_ray MunkB_ray DickinsBray ParaBot; do
    bin/bellhopcuda.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_ray_direct.py test/in/${testname}.ray /tmp/ref_${testname}.ray 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -qi 'fail\|ERROR'; then
        echo "FAIL: $testname GPU ray"; fail=$((fail+1))
    else
        echo "PASS: $testname GPU ray"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo '=== GPU TL Tests ==='
for testname in MunkB_Coh arcticB_cpp; do
    bin/bellhopcuda.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_shdfil_direct.py test/in/${testname}.shd /tmp/ref_${testname}.shd 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -q 'ERROR'; then
        echo "FAIL: $testname GPU TL"; fail=$((fail+1))
        echo "$result" | grep ERROR | head -3
    else
        echo "PASS: $testname GPU TL"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo '=== CPU Regression Tests ==='
for testname in MunkB_Coh arcticB_cpp; do
    bin/bellhopcxx.exe test/in/$testname > /dev/null 2>&1
    result=$(python3 compare_shdfil_direct.py test/in/${testname}.shd /tmp/ref_${testname}.shd 2>&1)
    if echo "$result" | grep -q 'ERROR'; then
        echo "FAIL: $testname CPU"; fail=$((fail+1))
    else
        echo "PASS: $testname CPU"; pass=$((pass+1))
    fi
done

echo ''
echo "TOTAL: PASS=$pass FAIL=$fail"
[ $fail -eq 0 ]
